patch.value: Add remediation registry entry for validate_metadata_duplicate_issue_codes warning

pm validate emits validate_metadata_duplicate_issue_codes:N (GH-235) as an advisory metadata warning, but the shared remediation registry (src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts) has no entry for it. So pm validate --fix-hints surfaces every other metadata finding's fix command but leaves duplicate-issue-code findings with no machine-executable remediation, forcing agents to hardcode the rename/merge fix.

Add validate_metadata_duplicate_issue_codes to REMEDIATION_REGISTRY with an executable command + summary covering the rename-or-close-as-duplicate fix; the mutual-exclusivity test still passes; pm validate --fix-hints on a tracker with duplicate issue codes lists the fix command.

src/core/diagnostics/remediation.ts: new validate-metadata registry entry before the resolution section. Tests: validate-command.spec attachValidateFixHints assertion + remediation-registry.spec resolveRemediation assertion. Verified in sandbox (two BUG-7 issues -> fix_hints includes the title command).

Implemented: added validate_metadata_duplicate_issue_codes to REMEDIATION_REGISTRY with command 'pm update <id> --title "<distinct title>"' and a summary covering the rename-or-close-as-duplicate fix. pm validate --check-metadata --fix-hints now lists the fix command for duplicate-issue-code findings (GH-235) instead of leaving them with no machine-executable remediation.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Post-merge evidence (PR #306, merged 2026-06-19T21:31:53Z, commit c7697a2e): all CI green. Sandbox-verified pm validate --check-metadata --fix-hints lists 'pm update <id> --title "<distinct title>"' for duplicate-issue-code findings. Summary now suggests structured 'pm close <id> --duplicate-of <canonical-id>' (Gemini review). CodeRabbit + Gemini converged with no remaining findings.
